title: WC2026 Match Predictor Input
description: Configure match prediction parameters for FIFA World Cup 2026.

home_team.title: Home Team
home_team.description: Name of the home/first team. Example: Brazil, England, Japan

away_team.title: Away Team
away_team.description: Name of the away/second team. Example: Morocco, Croatia, Netherlands

include_reasoning.title: Include AI Reasoning
include_reasoning.description: Include detailed match analysis text in output.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key (optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key for richer AI analysis. Leave blank to use built-in statistical model. Get one free at console.anthropic.com
